import logging
import json

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_request(request, context):
    if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
        logger.debug("Request details: %s", json.dumps(request.to_dict(), indent=2))
    
    payload = build_response_payload(context)
    if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.INFO):
        logger.info("Response payload: %s", json.dumps(payload))
    
    return payload


def sync_records(records: list[dict]):
    for record in records:
        enriched = enrich_record(record)
        if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
            logger.debug(
                "Processing record: %s",
                json.dumps(enriched, default=str, indent=2),
            )
        save(enriched)


def handle_batch(batch_id: str, items: list):
    summary = compute_batch_summary(items)
    if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.WARNING):
        logger.warning(
            "Batch %s summary: %d items, avg=%.2f, details=%s",
            batch_id, len(items), summary["avg"],
            json.dumps(summary),
        )
    return summary
